0:_UNIVERSE$find.name)||sym;}export function fmtPrice(p,sym){if(!p&&p!==0)return'N/A';if(sym&&sym.includes('-USD')){if(p>1000)return'$'+p.toLocaleString(undefined,{maximumFractionDigits:0});if(p>1)return'$'+p.toFixed(2);return'$'+p.toFixed(4);}return'$'+p.toFixed(2);}export async function fetchPrice(sym){let range=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:'1d';let interval=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:'5m';try{var _d$chart,_d$chart$result,_res$indicators,_res$indicators$quote,_res$indicators$quote2;const url=`${YF}${sym}?interval=${interval}&range=${range}`;const r=await 0:(_d$chart$result=_d$chart.result)===null||_d$chart$result===void 0?void 0:_d$chart$result[0];if(!res)return null;const price=res.meta.regularMarketPrice;const 0:_res$indicators$quote2.close)||[]};}catch{return null;}}export function useMarket(){const[prices,setPrices]=useState({});const[loadingMarket,setLoadingMarket]=useState(false);const
